name: Kildin Sami

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Kildin Saami (kild1236).

notes: Skeleton. Kildin Sami is a Kola (Eastern) Saami language of the Uralic family, written in an extended Cyrillic alphabet. The map covers the base Cyrillic letters plus the language-specific graphemes: Ӈ (velar nasal), the voiceless-sonorant letters Ӆ Ӎ Ӊ Ҏ, the voiceless glide Ҋ, and Һ (marking preaspiration). Iotated Е Ё Ю Я are given their glide+vowel reading. Suprasegmental palatalization (signalled by Ь/Ҍ and by Ӓ/Ӭ), preaspiration length and distinctive vowel length are not reliably recoverable from the spelling and are left unencoded, so a raised PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Kildin Saami (kild1236)
